title: Functions
source_outline: Defining and calling functions: def keyword; calling and returning values
Parameters: positional arguments; keyword arguments; default arguments; *args and **kwargs (introduction)
Scope: local vs global scope; the global keyword (brief)
Recursion: base case and recursive case; factorial as the worked example

next_assessment.title: Python Core Skills Checkpoint
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can translate a plain-English problem into correct, tested Python using variables, control flow, and functions.
